prestazioni: Engine: 7.3L AM29 V12 (engine code) dry-sump conversion with forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, billet crankshaft) and upgraded valvetrain (Titanium intake/exhaust valves, upgraded valve springs, and precision-machined camshafts by Cosworth for 8,500 RPM redline).

Forced Induction: Twin-turbocharged setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (custom billet compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves, paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler system (PWR Racing) and 1000cc ID1000 injectors (Injector Dynamics).

Drivetrain & Handling: Full carbon-fiber driveshaft (Pankl Racing Systems) with a 6-speed Graziano sequential transmission (upgraded dog rings, AP Racing twin-plate carbon clutch), paired with a custom KW Suspension 3-way Clubsport coilover kit (adjustable rebound, compression, and ride height) and Brembo GT-R monoblock calipers (380mm carbon-ceramic rotors with titanium pistons).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon-fiber aero package by Aston Martin Q (track-specific front splitter with active Gurney flap, rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts, and a fixed rear wing with adjustable angle of attack via hydraulic actuators).

Bodywork: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion (RML Group) with custom vented fenders (inspired by the Vulcan AMR Pro), lightweight polycarbonate side windows (Sabelt), and a bespoke livery by Viper Studios (matte gunmetal with neon green accents and carbon weave).

Interior: Full carbon-fiber monocoque chassis reinforcement (Aston Martin Racing) with a stripped-out cabin featuring a full FIA-spec roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000), Recaro Pole Position seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses), and a custom Motec C187 dash display with integrated data logging (GPS, lap timing, and telemetry).
